fields.description: Master kill-switch. When unchecked, no requests or jobs are profiled even if users have active sessions. Use this to pause all instrumentation site-wide without touching individual users' widgets.
fields.label: Profiler Enabled

fields.description: Profiler Session records older than this are eligible for automatic deletion by the daily housekeeping job. Set to 0 to keep forever.
fields.label: Session Retention (days)

fields.options:
Leave this table empty unless you know you want to override the default. The built-in filter already treats frappe, erpnext, hrms, lms, helpdesk, insights, crm, builder, wiki, drive, payments and any pip-installed library as framework code, so their findings route to the collapsed Framework-level observations sub-section automatically.

Populate this table only when you want to narrow the actionable list to a specific custom app. Example: if your custom app is jewellery_erpnext, adding just that app here means only jewellery_erpnext findings show as actionable; everything else (including erpnext, frappe, pip libs) routes to Observations.

Do not add frappe or erpnext here. Doing so flips them to "user code" and floods your actionable findings with framework noise — the opposite of what most users want.

How many identical calls from the same callsite qualify as a Redundant Call finding, and how many identical queries from the same callsite qualify as an N+1 finding. Lower = more sensitive = more findings; higher = fewer findings but less noise.

fields.description: Minimum get_doc calls for the same (doctype, name) from the same callsite before a Redundant Call finding is emitted.
fields.label: Redundant get_doc Threshold

fields.description: Minimum cache lookups for the same key from the same callsite before a Redundant Call finding is emitted. Cache lookups aren't individually timed, so low-count loops are indistinguishable from framework background noise — 50 matches the high-severity threshold and cuts 0ms noise.
fields.label: Redundant Cache Lookup Threshold

fields.description: Minimum has_permission calls for the same (doctype, name, ptype) from the same callsite before a Redundant Call finding is emitted.
fields.label: Redundant Permission Check Threshold

fields.description: Minimum identical queries from the same callsite before an N+1 Query finding is emitted.
fields.label: N+1 Minimum Occurrences
